live_newsroom.title: MLB
live_newsroom.headline: Pirates Total Gets Weather Check
live_newsroom.snapshot: The market gives Pittsburgh Pirates a modest edge, which makes line movement and book-to-book differences worth checking. A -132 moneyline implies roughly 56.9% before vig. Pittsburgh Pirates is getting more expensive, which usually points to stronger support or new information behind the favorite. Wind is helping carry, so the total deserves a closer look before first pitch.

sections.title: Futures Watch
cards: College Football Futures: Keep the board visible year-round because bettors track long-range prices months before kickoff.
NFL Futures: Watch schedule strength, quarterback health, roster movement and divisional prices.
NBA Futures: Track playoff paths, injury news, rest patterns and championship price movement.
NHL Futures: Watch goalie health, playoff seeding, travel spots and market adjustment.
Soccer Futures: Track title races, promotion/relegation pressure, tournament paths and transfer-window movement.
Tennis/Golf Futures: Draws, form, surface, course fit and injury news can reshape prices quickly.

sections.title: Betting Toolkit
cards: OddsTrader - betting odds, weather, line context, and matchup boards.
OddsTrader MLB Weather - wind, temperature and precipitation context for baseball totals.
The Odds API - structured odds feed for moneylines, spreads, and totals.
Action Network - market movement, betting splits, and injury context.
Covers - matchup pages, odds screens, and trend context.
Sportsbook Review - odds comparison and betting market coverage.

homepage_cards.headline: Pirates Total Gets Weather Check

IMPLIED PROBABILITY: Pittsburgh Pirates 56.9% before vig
MOVEMENT: Open -120 -> Current -132 (shortened for Pittsburgh Pirates)

homepage_cards.why_it_matters: The market gives Pittsburgh Pirates a modest edge, which makes line movement and book-to-book differences worth checking. A -132 moneyline implies roughly 56.9% before vig. Pittsburgh Pirates is getting more expensive, which usually points to stronger support or new information behind the favorite. Wind is helping carry, so the total deserves a closer look before first pitch.

editorial_standard.label: GSR Network Editorial Standard
editorial_standard.text: No gambling advice or picks. Prices, injuries, lineups, weather and fantasy usage are organized for human betting context.
